search_patterns: "{country}" (procurement OR tender OR RFP OR EOI) (digital OR trade OR agriculture OR mining OR compliance)
"{country}" (grant OR "call for proposals" OR accelerator OR challenge) (startup OR SME OR digital OR trade)
"{country}" (gold OR minerals OR mining OR cocoa OR cashew OR agriculture) (traceability OR compliance OR supply chain)
"{country}" (AfCFTA OR customs OR trade facilitation OR market access) (pilot OR procurement OR partnership)
notes: Highest near-term priority because Ghana, Nigeria, Cote d'Ivoire, Senegal, Sierra Leone, Liberia, and Guinea overlap strongly with trade, minerals, agriculture, and policy channels.

regional_orgs: Google for Startups Black Founders Fund
